polygon.style: stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #08306B; fill-opacity: 0.20;
stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #08306B; fill-opacity: 0.20;

text.style: font-size: 14.23px; font-weight: bold; fill: #666666; font-family: sans;

g.text: A = asymmetry index |EDF_yx - EDF_xy| / (EDF_yx + EDF_xy), in [0, 1]
EDF = effective degrees of freedom of the smooth
Signif. of smooth F-test: *** p<.001, ** p<.01, * p<.05, · p<.1
